content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently deploys AoA signature moves at appropriate moments: catching the qualifier ('what's that about?') in turn 2, directing somatic attention ('where does that land in your body?') in turn 6, naming the jaw as a kink point where emotion is held in turn 8 (a clear feeling-the-unfelt-emotion / kinked-emotions invocation), and inviting softening rather than CBT-style reframing. Critically, when the client begins to shut down in turns 11 and 13, the coach calibrates the threshold appropriately — respecting the 'I don't know if I want to say where yet' with 'you don't have to,' and at the cold/dissociation signal pivots immediately to feet ('what do you feel in your feet right now?'), one of the expected signature grounding questions. No anti-AoA frames, no 'trust the process' override, no loving-to-transform. Methodology is invoked when live, not as decoration.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the qualifier 'I think' — a signature AoA move of noticing the hedge rather than passing over it."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Validates honesty over readiness (anti-performance) and pivots to somatic inquiry — appropriate feel-over-figure move."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Where does that land in your body right now' — signature somatic question, deployed appropriately as emotion (embarrassment) is named."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names jaw-holding as a way feelings get stopped (kinked-emotions concept invoked at the live moment) and invites softening — clean AoA move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay with that' + location question — classic AoA tracking of the unfelt emotion."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Respects the client's 'I don't know if I want to say where' — calibrate-the-threshold in action. No persistence past the boundary."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "On somatic shutdown signal ('cold,' flatter voice), immediately pivots to feet grounding — one of the expected signature questions. Names the body pulling back without alarm."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["calibrate-the-threshold", "kinked-emotions", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "Can you feel your feet?", "How is your body right now?"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["become-the-authority-figure", "the-rush-signature", "What would help you slow down?"],
  "notes": "Conversation cuts at turn 14 mid-grounding; full referral to trauma-trained therapist not yet visible but the trajectory is consistent with appropriate methodology use. Misses are forgivable given the conversation length and the coach's correct prioritization of grounding over framework-naming."
}
